title: Keloglan Aramizda
overview: This comedy film tells the story of Keloğlan's adventures in Istanbul, where he comes with his mother to stay with his uncle. In the film, Keloğlan's friends Tırtıl and Bicirik help him defeat Çamur Şevket, the neighborhood bully, and save the neighborhood from trouble. Keloğlan is in love with Nurperi, the daughter of İsa Bey, the richest man in the neighborhood. However, Nurperi, being a wealthy city girl, does not pay much attention to Keloğlan. Unbeknownst to Keloğlan, Fatma, one of the beautiful girls in the neighborhood, also has feelings for him.
